_comment: Manual state layered over the computed data. `pieces` keys are repo folder names (npm name minus @activepieces/piece-). Allowed status overrides: in-progress | review | skip. Set `linear` when a ticket is opened. Claim a piece: add `assignee` (GitHub handle). Record work: add `pr` (upstream PR number). Stage is derived automatically — never write it. Everything else is computed by build.mjs — don't duplicate it here.

webhook.note: Payload is caller-defined — per skill table generic passthrough gets no schema. Decide: skip.

http.note: Generic passthrough (custom_api_call-like). Likely skip per skill table.

manual-trigger.note: Output is user-defined sample data. Likely skip.

forms.note: Fields are flow-author-defined — dynamicKey schema might work; needs a decision.

store.note: Values are arbitrary; envelope is stable. Partial schema possible.

tables.note: Record fields are user-defined — dynamicKey candidate.

subflows.note: Returns callback output from the sub-flow — arbitrary shape.

ai.note: Outputs vary by provider/mode; check per-action stability before scheming.
